text:
Hi FinnOtaku! i have a request for you! I want to map this song for Stepmania/Itg, and after, record it with a video on youtube, with the game file for download (obviously with credits to you and link to the original video). Can i do it? Please, i will be so much happy to do this!
And i have a second question. All the song has the same BPM? if yes, how many? Thank you so much!
author: @TanksBizarreAdventures

text:
Uuhm, sure, I guess. But I think the rearranged version should work better for this, which is linked in the description.

Also, the BPM doesn't stay the same during this whole thing:
0:00 - 1:48 : 166 BPM
1:48 - 1:53: Slows down from 166 to 60 BPM
1:53 ~ : 184 BPM
These values are used in both this version and the rearranged version.
author: @FinnOtaku

text:
I hadn't written it before, but yes, i think to use the A-Side of YTPMV. THANK YOU SO MUCH for the BPM info, mapping on stepmania is not simple and use the correct BPMs is essential.
Thank you again for letting me to use your song!
i hope to make a great job!
author: @TanksBizarreAdventures
